channel.title: Tutorial on Danielle Cosme
channel.description: Recent content in Tutorial on Danielle Cosme

item.title: Websites in RStudio
item.description: This tutorial was created by Dani Cosme and Sam Chavez as part of PSY 607: Data Science Seminar at the University of Oregon. The tutorial and associated files can also be found on GitHub. Overview of the tutorial Background Learn the basics Explore advanced features Check out the hugo-academic theme Publish your website to GitHub Background Most of the information in this tutorial is taken from a few amazing resources on using the blogdown package to create static websites in RStudio using R Markdown:
